        CASE WHEN ld_cmp.mlrelindb = 'X' THEN SUM(bsl) ELSE 0 END AS bsalk3,
        CASE WHEN ld_cmp.mlrelindc = 'X' THEN SUM(csl) ELSE 0 END AS csalk3,
        CASE WHEN ld_cmp.mlrelindd = 'X' THEN SUM(dsl) ELSE 0 END AS dsalk3,
        CASE WHEN ld_cmp.mlrelinde = 'X' THEN SUM(esl) ELSE 0 END AS esalk3,
        CASE WHEN ld_cmp.mlrelindf = 'X' THEN SUM(fsl) ELSE 0 END AS fsalk3,
        CASE WHEN ld_cmp.mlrelindg = 'X' THEN SUM(gsl) ELSE 0 END AS gsalk3
      FROM "CL_FML_ACDOCA_EXT_VALIDATION=>ACDOCA#covw" AS a
      INNER JOIN "_SYS_IT_FINSC_LD_CMP_2" AS ld_cmp
        ON  ld_cmp.rldnr = a.rldnr
      INNER JOIN "_SYS_LT_KALNR_2" AS k
        ON  k.kalnr = a.kalnr

        AND (

--                "         -> evaluation should work
                 (     bcf.vtrhj IS NULL
                   AND a.poper       <> '000' )
--                "chunk 2: BCF has been done -> records from year before could be aged / archived
--                "         -> evaluation for current year should work
              OR (     bcf.vtrhj IS NOT NULL
                   AND (    (     a.ryear       =  bcf.vtrhj
                              AND a.poper       =  '000' )
                         OR (     a.ryear       >= bcf.vtrhj
                              AND a.poper       <> '000' ) ) )
            )
      GROUP BY

                      inner join "CL_FSH_DCI_CONTROL_GRIR=>EKPO#covw" as e1 -- Join EKPO to fetch reference Item
                      on  e.mandt = e1.mandt
                      and e.ebeln = e1.ebeln
                      and e.ebelp = e1.ebelp
                      inner join "_SYS_IT_DM07M_2" as d
                      on  e.buzei = d.zeild
                      where d.xelik = 'X'  -- Automatic DCI is set
                      and   d.vzbew = '+') select distinct e.mandt, e.ebeln, e.ebelp, e.werks, e.uebpo, e.elikz, e1.menge,

                     e1.untto

                    on  eb.ebeln = e.ebeln
                    and eb.uebpo = e.uebpo
                    inner join "CL_FSH_DCI_CONTROL_GRIR=>EKKO#covw" as ek
                    on  e.mandt = ek.mandt
                    and e.ebeln = ek.ebeln
                    inner join "CL_FSH_DCI_CONTROL_GRIR=>EKPO#covw" as e1       -- get generic article details
                    on  e.mandt = e1.mandt
                    and e.ebeln = e1.ebeln

                    on  e.mandt = ekd.mandt
                    and e.ebeln = ekd.ebeln
                    and e.ebelp = ekd.ebelp
                    where e.mandt = SESSION_CONTEXT('CLIENT')
                    group by e.mandt, e.ebeln, e.ebelp, e.werks, e.uebpo, e.elikz, e1.menge, e1.untto, shkzg

                     e1.untto

                    on  eb.ebeln = e.ebeln
                    and eb.uebpo = e.uebpo
                    inner join "CL_FSH_DCI_CONTROL_GRIR=>EKKO#covw" as ek
                    on  e.mandt = ek.mandt
                    and e.ebeln = ek.ebeln

                    on  e.mandt = e1.mandt

                    and e.ebelp = ekd.ebelp
                    where e.mandt = SESSION_CONTEXT('CLIENT')
